name: ACE Cash Express - ATM
description_short: ACE Cash Express Charlotte location offers ATM services, check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment with extended hours beyond traditional banks.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a physical location in Charlotte, NC at 3301 Freedom Dr that functions as a multi-service financial access point. The company is primarily known for check-cashing services but has expanded into broader financial services including ATM operations, money transfers via MoneyGram, and prepaid card products. This Charlotte location is open Monday-Thursday 9 AM-7 PM, Friday 9 AM-8 PM, and Saturday 9 AM-5 PM, providing significantly longer hours than traditional banks. The location serves consumers who need immediate cash access, check cashing without a bank account, and bill payment services.

The location offers a comprehensive menu of financial services beyond basic ATM access. Core offerings include check cashing for most check types with only a valid government-issued ID required, no bank account necessary. Additional services include MoneyGram money transfers to over 200 countries, MoneyGram money orders, bill payment for rent and utilities, tax refund check cashing, and business check cashing. The company also offers prepaid card products (ACE Elite Visa Card, Flare Account, and Porte accounts) with mobile banking integration and in-person support at this location.

This location distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, particularly Friday evening (until 8 PM) and Saturday morning access that exceed typical bank hours. The company maintains cash on hand for large business check deposits and advertises competitive fees. Banking partnerships with Pathward, N.A. (FDIC-insured) provide account and card products with regulatory backing. The integrated approach of combining traditional check-cashing with modern digital banking tools through Porte's mobile app appeals to underbanked consumers seeking both immediate cash access and longer-term banking solutions.

However, this location should be evaluated carefully as a primary financial institution. While positioned as a convenient alternative, fees for check cashing and money transfers are not disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible. The company's traditional check-cashing business model, while convenient, typically involves higher per-transaction costs than traditional banks. Additionally, this is a single location in Charlotte—not a comprehensive banking alternative—and consumers should clarify actual fee structures before relying on these services for regular financial needs.
address: 3301 Freedom Dr Ste B, Charlotte, NC 28208

company_info.headquarters: 3301 Freedom Dr Ste B, Charlotte, NC 28208

pros: Extended hours: Open until 8 PM Friday and 5 PM Saturday, beyond typical bank hours
No bank account required for check cashing—only valid government-issued ID needed
Large cash reserves available for business check deposits of any size
MoneyGram money transfer services to 200+ countries and territories
Multiple prepaid card options (ACE Elite Visa, Flare Account, Porte) with mobile banking integration
Integrated bill payment for rent, utilities, and credit cards in-store and online
Tax refund check cashing and cash withdrawal from tax cards
cons: Check cashing and service fees not disclosed on website—actual costs remain unclear
Single location in Charlotte—not a full-service banking alternative
Check cashing business model typically involves higher per-transaction costs than traditional banks
Limited transparency about fee structure for money transfers and other services
Prepaid card products require additional activation and ID verification steps
best_for: Consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking check cashing outside standard banking hours
Business owners needing to cash large checks with same-day access to funds
Individuals sending or receiving international money transfers via MoneyGram
Underbanked consumers interested in prepaid debit cards with mobile banking features
diagnosis: This location is best for consumers without bank accounts who need check cashing outside standard banking hours, particularly business owners with large deposits or individuals sending international money transfers. The main caveat is that actual fee structures are not disclosed on the website, and traditional check-cashing services typically charge higher per-transaction costs than banks—consumers should confirm pricing before regular use.
services: ATM cash withdrawals and balance inquiries
Check cashing (most types without bank account required)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
Bill payment services (rent, utilities, credit cards) in-store and online
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
Porte mobile banking account with in-person support
Business check cashing with cash-on-hand guarantee
Card funding services (loading cash to debit and prepaid cards)
Tax services (tax refund and tax card withdrawal)

reviews.author: M M
reviews.text: Trina Trina Trina Trina! Trina makes it happen! Always greets with a smile 😃.  Always gives good service and advice on cash services. She gets it done quick fast and in a hurry. She never messes up or makes a mistake. I send all my friends and associates to work with Trina because I trust her. I seen with my own eyes one time a customer miscounted and Trina was honest about it! If you need money services, check cash, money orders, etc. Trina is the one you need to go see! I recommend 10/10 ! 💯

reviews.author: Darricka White
reviews.text: Trina was immaculate! She definitely helped me & was very patient in the process. She was very accurate & educational on the products the business had to offer :) thanks love.. you definitely saved my day!!

reviews.author: Ronald Langston
reviews.text: Kind and courteous, very professional and helped me quickly even with a store full of other customers. Thank you and great work Chris! (ps. someone give this guy a raise!)

reviews.author: Sade Hart
reviews.text: Chris provided excellent service. He was friendly, efficient, and made the whole process quick and easy. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Dreana Crowe
reviews.text: Chevron was excellent  excellent  customer service. Great awesome employee she is a keeper
